heading: Jessica Lunsford Address Verification Grant Program
label: 20988 Jessica Lunsford Address Verification Grant Program
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 16988 of Title 42

children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: There is established the Jessica Lunsford Address Verification Grant Program (hereinafter in this section referred to as the “Program”).

children.heading: Grants authorized
children.label: b Grants authorized
children.text: Under the Program, the Attorney General is authorized to award grants to State, local governments, and Indian tribal governments to assist in carrying out programs requiring an appropriate official to verify, at appropriate intervals, the residence of all or some registered sex offenders.1So in original. Probably should be “States,”.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Each State or local government seeking a grant under this section shall submit an application to the Attorney General at such time, in such manner, and accompanied by such information as the Attorney General may reasonably require.

children.label: A
children.text: describe the activities for which assistance under this section is sought; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide such additional assurances as the Attorney General determines to be essential to ensure compliance with the requirements of this section.

children.heading: Innovation
children.label: d Innovation
children.text: In making grants under this section, the Attorney General shall ensure that different approaches to address verification are funded to allow an assessment of effectiveness.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each of the fiscal years 2007 through 2009 such sums as may be necessary to carry out this section.

children.label: A
children.text: assessing the effectiveness and value of this section;

children.label: B
children.text: comparing the cost effectiveness of address verification to reduce sex offenses compared to other alternatives; and

children.label: C
children.text: making recommendations for continuing funding and the appropriate levels for such funding.
